title: CV deep dive: production detection, video, multimodal
focus: YOLO production pipeline; video transformers; CLIP fusion.

items.label: Redundant Connection
interviewQuestions: Is this BFS, DFS, or Union-Find? Defend the choice over the other two.
Walk through complexity in terms of V and E. Where do those costs come from?
How would you handle disconnected components, self-loops, or duplicate edges?

items.label: Production object detection pipelines
interviewQuestions: Walk through deploying a YOLO model in production — pre/post-processing, NMS, calibration.
How would you handle class imbalance and rare categories in a production detection model?

items.label: Video understanding (3D CNN, video transformers)
interviewQuestions: Compare 3D CNNs vs two-stream vs video transformers for action recognition.
Why is temporal modeling hard, and what does sparse temporal sampling buy you?
What makes text-to-video generation harder than text-to-image generation?
How would you evaluate temporal consistency, motion quality, and prompt adherence for generated video?

items.label: Multimodal CV: image-text, video-text
interviewQuestions: Walk me through how a multimodal model fuses vision and text — case study CLIP.
Where does CLIP fail, and how do later models (SigLIP, EVA-CLIP) improve it?
